rawText:
ROHAN SAKTHIVEL P 
Data Scientist 
Chennai, India  |  +91 701061 1469  |  rohanpkg07@gmail.com 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
Data Scientist with 1+ years of experience designing and deploying predictive models, capacity forecasting systems, and 
agentic AI workflows on enterprise-grade platforms. Proficient in Python, GCP, and end-to-end ML pipelines spanning data 
processing, model evaluation, and production deployment. Passionate about applying data science to solve real-world 
infrastructure and business problems at scale. 
EDUCATION 
B.E. Medical Electronics  |  Saveetha Engineering College  |  2020 - 2024  |  CGPA: 8.4 
HSC  |  Christ Matriculation School  |  2019 - 2020  |  78% 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
Programming:  Python, C 
MLOps & Cloud:  GCP, Kubeflow Pipelines, Jupyter, Docker 
Data Science:  EDA, Data Processing, Model Selection & Training, Model Evaluation, Deep Learning 
GenAI / LLMs:  RAG & Vector Databases, Orchestration & Agents, Guardrails 
Automation & APIs:  Python Automation, REST APIs 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
Data Scientist  |  Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)  -  Chennai, India 2024 - Present 
Enterprise Projects 
Infrastructure Intelligence Platform - Europe's Largest Furniture Brand 
• Developed a capacity forecasting model on CPU/memory utilization data from 2000+ servers, predicting future 
demand trends and enabling proactive infrastructure scaling that prevented resource exhaustion. 
• Built an ML-driven Client Roaming success prediction model that analyzed wireless session patterns to identify 
roaming failures before they impacted end-users, improving network reliability across enterprise sites. 
• Designed and deployed an Agentic backup monitoring dashboard that autonomously evaluates backup job health, 
triggers alerts, and generates incident summaries using LLM-based reasoning. 
Enterprise Automation for Device Migration - Europe's Largest Clothing Brand 
• Developed Python automation scripts for large-scale AOS device migration across enterprise infrastructure, 
integrating REST APIs for metadata extraction, validation, and migration with full error handling. 
• Automated workflows previously handled by ~15 engineers across 2 shifts; reduced the project timeline from 1 year 
to 6 months with a 95%+ migration success rate. 
Personal Projects 
Stock Sentiment Analysis Bot 
• Built an automated n8n workflow that scrapes and aggregates financial news, runs sentiment analysis on stock 
mentions, and delivers structured buy/sell/hold signals to a personal Discord channel bot. 
Academic Projects 
Osteosarcoma Detection using Binary CNN 
• Built an end-to-end ML pipeline for bone cancer cell detection achieving 90%+ classification accuracy. 
• Applied SMOTE for class imbalance handling, performed thorough model evaluation, and deployed via a Flask web 
interface. 
PUBLICATIONS & CERTIFICATIONS 
• Research Publication - IEEE International Conference (ICITITE), VIT 
• Azure Agentic AI Fundamentals - Microsoft Azure Workshop Badge 
• NPTEL Certified - Python Programming, Internet of Things
